mission.title: pushgateway: Expose metrics metadata in HTTP API
mission.description: Expose metrics metadata in HTTP API. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current pushgateway deployment
steps.description:
Verify your pushgateway version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n pushgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=pushgateway
helm list -n pushgateway 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working pushgateway installation.

steps.title: Review pushgateway configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant pushgateway configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n pushgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=pushgateway
kubectl get configmap -n pushgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=pushgateway
```
The way I understand it when interacting with a registered metric via pushgateway API (PUT, POST, DELET, etc.) you need to match grouping key exactly.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Expose metrics metadata in HTTP API
steps.description:
This PR relates to https://github.com/prometheus/pushgateway/issues/264

I've created a POC so this PR would still be a working progress, I just wanted to get early feedback before keep moving forward, summary:

- Added the new `--web.enable-admin-api` flag
- Added the new `/-/wipe` route for the
```yaml
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": [
    {
      "grouping_key": "7344000326925601179",
      "labels": {"job": "some_job", "label1": "label1_value"},
      "metrics": {
        "some_metric_1": {
          "type": "untyped",
          "help": "",
          "value": "3.14",
          "labels": {"instance": "", "job": "some_job", "label1": "label1_value"}
        },
        "push_failure_time_seconds": {
          "type": "gauge",
          "help": "Last Unix time when changing this group in the Pushgateway failed.",
          "value": "0",
          "labels": {"instance": "", "job": "some_job"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n pushgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=pushgateway
kubectl get events -n pushgateway --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Expose metrics metadata in HTTP API" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR relates to https://github.com/prometheus/pushgateway/issues/264

I've created a POC so this PR would still be a working progress, I just wanted to get early feedback before keep moving forward, summary:

- Added the new `--web.enable-admin-api` flag
- Added the new `/-/wipe` route for the `PUT` verb
- I've created a new `WipePersistentFile` handler, this handler have a bunch of comments

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with pushgateway installed or the issue environment reproducible.
